description: Style Note Add a pop of colour to your summer wear wardrobe with this top from myntra. Featuring a colourful, all over print this piece scores high on style as well as comfort. Accessorise it with beaded bracelets and strappy wedge heels for an effortless yet inspired look. Product Details Grey printed top with pink, yellow and green floral print, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, short sleeves with tapering cuffs and a decorative button, back yoke with a pink tape detail, pink tape detail diagonally across the shoulder, drawstring tie at the waist and a slightly curved hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Tumble dry low Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
